title: Queryables for Geoportal STAC API
description: Queryable names Geoportal STAC API Item Search filter.

HorizontalFieldOfView.title: Horizontal Field Of View
HorizontalFieldOfView.description: The camera’s scope in the horizontal direction. The unit is degrees, and valid values range from 0 to 360.

CameraRoll.title: Camera Roll
CameraRoll.description: The camera orientation of the final rotation around the z-axis of the camera in the positive clockwise direction. The unit is degrees. Valid values range from -90 to 90.

CameraPitch.title: Camera Pitch
CameraPitch.description: The camera orientation of the second rotation around the x-axis of the camera in the positive counterclockwise direction. The unit is degrees. The pitch is 0 degrees when the camera is facing vertically down to the ground. The valid range of pitch value is from 0 to 180 degrees, with 180 degrees for a camera facing vertically up, and 90 degrees for a camera facing horizontally.

CameraHeading.title: Camera Heading
CameraHeading.description: The camera orientation of the first rotation around the z-axis of the camera. The unit is degrees. The heading values are measured in the positive clockwise direction, where north is defined as 0 degrees. When the orientation is unknown, -999 is used.

AcquisitionDate.title: Acquisition Date
AcquisitionDate.description: The date when the image was collected. The time of the image collection can also be included.

VerticalFieldOfView.title: Vertical Field of View
VerticalFieldOfView.description: The camera’s scope in the vertical direction. The unit is degrees, and valid values range from 0 to 180.

ImagePath.title: Image Path
ImagePath.description: The path to the image file. The image path can be a local path or a web-accessible URL. Also, the image path can be a 'FA' if the image is stored as an attachment to the feature. The supported image formats are JPEG, JPG, TIFF, and MRF.

FarDistance.title: Far Distance
FarDistance.description: The farthest usable distance of the imagery from the camera position. This value is used to determine the extent of the image footprint, which is used to determine whether an image is returned when you click the map, and for creating optional footprint features. The unit is meters.

NearDistance.title: Near Distance
NearDistance.description: The nearest usable distance of the imagery from the camera position. The unit is meters.

oi:maximum_distance.title: Maximum Distance
oi:maximum_distance.description: The farthest usable distance of the imagery from the camera position. This value is used to determine the extent of the image footprint, which is used to determine whether an image is returned when you click the map, and for creating optional footprint features. The unit is meters.

oi:camera_heading.title: Camera Heading (oi)
oi:camera_heading.description: The camera orientation of the first rotation around the z-axis of the camera. The value is in degrees.

oi:camera_height.title: Camera Height
oi:camera_height.description: The height of the camera above the ground. The unit is meters. Camera height is used to determine the visible extent of the image in which large values result in a greater view extent. Values must be greater than 0.

oi:camera_pitch.title: Camera Pitch
oi:camera_pitch.description: The camera orientation of the second rotation around the x-axis of the camera in the positive counterclockwise direction. The unit is degrees. The pitch is 0 degrees when the camera is facing vertically down to the ground. The valid range of pitch value is from 0 to 180 degrees, with 180 degrees for a camera facing vertically up, and 90 degrees for a camera facing horizontally.

oi:camera_roll.title: Camera Roll
oi:camera_roll.description: The camera orientation of the final rotation around the z-axis of the camera in the positive clockwise direction. The unit is degrees. Valid values range from -90 to 90.

oi:image_rotation.title: Image Rotation (oi)
oi:image_rotation.description: The orientation of the camera in degrees relative to the scene when the image was captured. The value is added to CameraRoll. The valid values range from -360 to 360.

oi:near_distance.title: Near Distance (oi)
oi:near_distance.description: The nearest usable distance of the imagery from the camera position. The unit is meters.

oi:far_distance.title: Far Distance (oi)
oi:far_distance.description: The farthest usable distance of the imagery from the camera position. This value is used to determine the extent of the image footprint, which is used to determine whether an image is returned when you click the map, and for creating optional footprint features. The unit is meters.

oi:horizontal_field_of_view.title: Horizontal Field Of View (oi)
oi:horizontal_field_of_view.description: The camera’s scope in the horizontal direction. The unit is degrees, and valid values range from 0 to 360.

oi:vertical_field_of_view.title: Vertical Field of View (oi)
oi:vertical_field_of_view.description: The camera’s scope in the vertical direction. The unit is degrees, and valid values range from 0 to 180.

oi:orientation_accuracy.title: Orientation Accuracy (oi)
oi:orientation_accuracy.description: Accuracy is defined as a string of eight semicolon-delimited values that define the standard deviation of the oriented imagery properties.

video:shape.description: Pixel dimensions of video, expressed as [rows, columns]

video:frame_rate.title: video:frame_rate
video:frame_rate.description: The mean frame rate, frames per second (frame count / time extent). Either video:frame_rate or video:frame_count are highly recommended.

video:frame_count.title: video:frame_count
video:frame_count.description: The count of frames in the video. Either video:frame_rate or video:frame_count are highly recommended.

video:constant_scene.title: video:constant_scene
video:constant_scene.description: Flag indicating that both the frame geometries and sensor centers remain constant throughout the video. Default is false.

video:letterbox.title: video:letterbox
video:letterbox.description: Rectangular window containing useful (non-fill) pixel values, if different from video:shape, in the form [columns_offset, rows_offset, width, height]

video:sensor_name.title: video:sensor_name
video:sensor_name.description: Image source sensor name (corresponds to MISB ST 0601.17.11)

video:miis_core_id.title: video:miis_core_id
video:miis_core_id.description: MIIS core identifier (corresponds to MISB ST 0601.17.94)

pc:count.title: pc:count
pc:count.description: The number of points in the Item.

pc:type.title: pc:type
pc:type.description: Phenomenology type for the point cloud. Possible valid values might include lidar, eopc, radar, sonar, or other.

pc:density.title: pc:density
pc:density.description: Number of points per square unit area.
